name: Friendship Prune Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Prunes, cooked, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the starter is warm and very active.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Gently fold in the Friendship starter and buttermilk.
5. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt).
6. Mix the prunes and walnuts into the batter gently.
7. Combine the wet and dry ingredients until just mixed.
8. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9 x 13 inch cake tin.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes.
10. For cupcakes, bake for about 25 minutes.
11. Orange cream cheese icing is recommended.
